description:
As a system administrator
  I want to verify the complete order lifecycle from creation to mutual review
  So that I can ensure the platform functions correctly for end users

elements.name: Customer publishes order, driver bids, delivers, and both review

steps.name: the delivery platform is running
I exist as a customer with email "user@customer.com" and password "besmillah"
I exist as a driver with email "user@driver.com" and password "besmillah"
I log in as "user@customer.com" with password "besmillah"
I navigate to the create order page
I enter the order information:

result.error_message:
page.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for locator('input[placeholder="Order Title"], input[name="title"]')[22m

    at World.<anonymous> (D:\matrix-delivery\tests\step_definitions\full_order_flow_steps.js:100:25)

steps.name: I set the pickup location to:
I set the delivery location to:
I publish the new order
I should see a success message
I logout
I log in as "user@driver.com" with password "besmillah"
I view the available orders
I place a bid of "45.00" on the order "Urgent Document Delivery"
I should see my bid listed
I logout
I log in as "user@customer.com" with password "besmillah"
I view my orders
I view the details of order "Urgent Document Delivery"
I accept the bid from "user@driver.com"
the order status updates to "Accepted"
I logout
I log in as "user@driver.com" with password "besmillah"
I view my accepted orders
I view the details of order "Urgent Document Delivery"
I mark the order as "Picked Up"
the order status updates to "In Transit"
I mark the order as "Delivered"
the order status updates to "Delivered"
I click the button "Review Customer"
I submit a 5-star review with comment "Great customer, easy pickup."
I should see the text "Review submitted successfully"
I logout
I log in as "user@customer.com" with password "besmillah"
I view my orders
I view the details of order "Urgent Document Delivery"
I click the button "Review Driver"
I submit a 5-star review with comment "Excellent driver, very fast."
I should see the text "Review submitted successfully"

name: Full Order Flow E2E
